Off Calendar Jan-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion to appoint a receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
